mapper.sql: id, goods_id, number, money, creat_date, year, month, user_id, quantity, start_time, end_time, duration, status, opinion
mapper.insert: insert into goods_orders (id, goods_id, number, money, creat_date, year, month, user_id, quantity, start_time, end_time, duration, status, opinion) values (#{id}, #{goodsId}, #{number}, #{money}, #{creatDate}, #{year}, #{month}, #{userId}, #{quantity}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{status}, #{opinion})

insert into goods_orders
id, goods_id, number, money, creat_date, year, month, user_id, quantity, start_time, end_time, duration, status, opinion,
#{id}, #{goodsId}, #{number}, #{money}, #{creatDate}, #{year}, #{month}, #{userId}, #{quantity}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{status}, #{opinion},
mapper.select:
select
from goods_orders order by id desc

select
from goods_orders where ${field} = ${value} order by id desc

select t1.*, t2.name as t2_name, t3.name as t3_name, t3.cellphone as t3_cellphone, t3.avatar as t3_avatar from goods_orders t1 left join goods t2 on t1.goods_id = t2.id left join user t3 on t1.user_id = t3.id where t1.id = #{id}

select t1.*, t2.name as t2_name from goods_orders t1 left join goods t2 on t1.goods_id = t2.id where t1.user_id = #{userId} and t1.status = 1 or t1.status = 3 and t1.end_time > #{date} order by t1.id asc
